concerns.text: T021 implements 'Retrieval Diversity' calculation but lacks a verification step to ensure this metric is stored in the final output (experiment_log.csv) as required by FR-006 and SC-002. The task description stops at 'implementation' without confirming the data flow to the log, risking a silent drop of the acceptance criterion.

T027 describes implementing a 'Safe Pruning' heuristic but omits the explicit frequency constraint 'after every 10 tasks' mandated by FR-004 and Constitution Principle VII. Without this explicit scoping in the task, the implementation may drift to a different frequency, violating the intervention fidelity required to validate the causal link.

T030 implements 'Logistic Regression with a Quadratic Term' (per plan correction) but fails to include a verification step to confirm the output includes the 'tipping point' breakpoint value as required by SC-004. The task focuses on the model type but does not explicitly mandate the extraction/reporting of the specific metric defined in the success criteria.

T033 implements the sensitivity analysis logic for pruning thresholds {5, 10, 20} but lacks a verification step to ensure the results of this analysis are reported in the final output. The spec's 'Threshold Justification' assumption requires this verification evidence; the task only covers the logic execution, risking a silent drop of the verification artifact.
